fields.lr_schedule: linear warmup over warmup_steps=4000, then decay proportionally to the inverse square root of the step number

markdown:
- **optimizer:** Adam [1]
- **beta1:** 0.9 [1]
- **beta2:** 0.98 [1]
- **epsilon:** 10^{-9} [1]
- **lr_schedule:** linear warmup over warmup_steps=4000, then decay proportionally to the inverse square root of the step number [1][2]

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
[2] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
summary: The optimizer used in Attention Is All You Need is the Adam optimizer.
